metadata.name: Add a Video to a Product Page

description: A merchandiser wants to embed a product demonstration video from YouTube onto a product page.

nodes.task_description: Locate the product to be updated.
Add the YouTube video embed code to a dedicated 'video' field in the product information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully saves the embed code.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the video now appears and plays correctly on the live product page.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the page and confirms the video is working.
